info.title: EV Fleet Electrification & Solar Sizing API
info.description:
## The only API that correctly models commercial fleet electrification end-to-end

Most fleet electrification tools give you a vehicle range estimate.
This API gives you the **complete infrastructure picture** — every number cited
to a named regulatory or research source.

### What a single API call returns

| Output | Source |
|---|---|
| Fleet annual charging load (kWh) | NREL EVI-Pro 2023; DOE AFDC 2024 |
| Peak demand added (kW) | SAE J1772:2023; NREL EVI-Pro 2023 |
| Annual demand charge increase ($) | OpenEI Utility Rate Database 2024 |
| EVSE infrastructure cost | NREL/TP-7A40-87610; BloombergNEF 2024 |
| Vehicle purchase credit | IRA §45W / UK ECA / FAME-II India |
| EVSE tax credit | IRA §30C / UK WCS / AU CEFC |
| Solar system size to offset fleet | NASA POWER MERRA-2; PVWatts V8 |
| Solar financial analysis | Ramasamy 2023 NREL/TP-7A40-87610 |
| Solar ITC | IRA §48E / UK ECA / AU LRET |

### Multi-jurisdiction support
US (all 50 states) · UK · Australia · India · South Africa · Singapore

### Plans
- **Free:** $0/mo — 5 calls/min — quick fleet load estimate
- **Pro:** $79/mo — full analysis + solar sizing + incentives + 25-yr cashflow
- **Enterprise:** $249/mo — unlimited + batch fleet modelling

post.description:
**Quick fleet electrification estimate — Free plan.**

Provide vehicle type, fleet size, daily mileage, and state/country.
Returns fleet charging load, peak demand impact, and demand charge exposure.

No site data needed. Fast feasibility screen before detailed analysis.

**Full fleet electrification + solar analysis — Pro plan required.**

Complete analysis combining:
- Fleet charging load and peak demand impact
- EVSE infrastructure cost and incentives (§30C, UK WCS, AU CEFC, IN FAME-II)
- Vehicle purchase credits (§45W, UK ECA, FAME-II)
- Solar system sizing to offset fleet charging (PVWatts V8, NASA POWER)
- Solar ITC calculation (§48E + adders)
- Managed charging savings model
- Multi-jurisdiction: US, UK, Australia, India, South Africa, Singapore

get.description: Fleet vehicle database — EPA fueleconomy.gov (2024) + manufacturer specs.
EVSE specifications and costs — SAE J1772:2023; NREL/TP-7A40-87610.
Demand charge rates — OpenEI Utility Rate Database (2024).
Solar climate zones and NASA POWER capacity factors.
Incentive programs by country — IRA, UK WCS, AU CEFC, IN FAME-II.
Full citation register for every calculation in this API.

simultaneous_fraction.title: Simultaneous Fraction
simultaneous_fraction.description: Fraction of fleet charging simultaneously. NREL: 0.75–0.90

managed_charging.title: Managed Charging
managed_charging.description: Smart charging reduces coincident peak by ~40% [NREL EVI-Pro 2023]

existing_peak_kw.title: Existing Peak Kw
existing_peak_kw.description: Current site peak demand kW (from your utility bill)

existing_annual_kwh.title: Existing Annual Kwh
existing_annual_kwh.description: Current site annual energy consumption kWh

available_roof_m2.title: Available Roof M2
available_roof_m2.description: Available roof/carport area for solar panels (m²)

custom_demand_rate.title: Custom Demand Rate
custom_demand_rate.description: Override state demand rate USD/kW/month with actual tariff

daily_miles_per_vehicle.title: Daily Miles Per Vehicle
daily_miles_per_vehicle.description: Average miles driven per vehicle per day

state.title: State
state.description: US state code (e.g. CA, TX) or DEFAULT

country.title: Country
country.description: Country code: US, UK, AU, IN, ZA, SG
